title: Absolute Cinema
description: Adds several movie industry related items to the game.
body:
![ABSOLUTE CINEMA](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36b26af4f99221bc6875b8a784e983c734f67932.png)
# How to get an items in the game?

Go to the project gallery and read the description of the item you need...
### Or use [RP Renames](https://modrinth.com/mod/rp-renames) idk lol :3

# Requirements
This resourcepack require [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) or [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home)/[OptiFabric](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/optifabric)
